description_long: This is a large stone church with a rectangular nave, a prominent square bell tower at one end, and multiple pitched roofs. The exterior walls are constructed from gray stone blocks, with arched windows and buttresses along the sides. The bell tower features crenellations and louvered openings, typical of Gothic architecture, and rises significantly above the rest of the structure. Surrounding the church is a graveyard with headstones and a small stone path leading to the main entrance, which is marked by a set of steps and a porch. The roof is made of slate tiles, and the windows are tall and narrow, some of which may contain stained glass. The church sits on a landscaped plot with grass and a few trees, giving it a historic and solemn appearance.
description: A large, historic stone church with a tall square bell tower, arched windows, and a surrounding graveyard. The structure features Gothic architectural elements and a slate-tiled roof.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the church, the main entrance with steps, and the tall bell tower on the right.
description_view_1: Front view dominated by the imposing bell tower, with the main entrance and steps clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length of the church, arched windows, and the bell tower on the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the church, the pitched roof, and the graveyard extending behind the building.
